description: Tiny cross-lingual DE->EN retrieval: German queries, English documents (plumbing).

corpus.text: Berlin is the capital and largest city of Germany.
The notice period for a rented apartment is usually three months.
Small businesses do not charge VAT under the small-business rule.
A sick child must be reported to the employer in good time.
The recipe combines apples, cinnamon and sugar for a cake.
